name: sugar-pep-bootstrap-verifier

acceptedTools.name: recompute-spec-cids
acceptedTools.purpose: Recompute spec CIDs and candidate catalog CID.

acceptedTools.name: compute_fixture_cid
acceptedTools.purpose: Recompute JCS-based CIDs for catalog snapshots and PEP JSON bodies.

acceptedManualAssertions: The only catalog property added in v1.6.2 is content-addressed-ci-protocol.
The added property is an extension protocol and not a core substrate rule.
No language kit must change emitted ProofIR, canonicalization, lifting, or verification behavior to remain v1.6.2 compatible.
